query:
SELECT vocusServiceId, planId, serviceStatus, customerName, address, suburb, state, postcode
FROM vocus_nbn_services 
WHERE suburb LIKE '%Tewantin%' OR address LIKE '%Tewantin%' OR address LIKE '%Cooroy Noosa%'
LIMIT 5;
